e1.name: K Kaha Stays Nepal's Premium Hotels

e46.name: Hotel Yak & Yeti Verified ★★★★★ 10 photos -88% Hotel Yak & Yeti Kathmandu, Kathmandu Show on map A heritage luxury hotel in the heart of Kathmandu, blending traditional Nepali architecture with modern five-star amenities. Set within six acres of lush gardens, the hotel features fine dining, a world-class spa, and a century-old palace wing. Free WiFi Parking Breakfast Restaurant +4 more Free cancellation available You can cancel later — lock in this great price today! Only 2 left at this price! Exceptional 10 reviews 9.6 Recommended 1 night, 2 adults NPR 45,000 NPR 5,500 Includes taxes and charges See availability

e49.name: Temple Tree Resort & Spa Verified ★★★★★ 7 photos -68% Temple Tree Resort & Spa Pokhara, Kaski Show on map An award-winning boutique resort on the serene shores of Phewa Lake. Experience world-class spa treatments, organic farm-to-table dining, and breathtaking Annapurna views from every room. Free WiFi Parking Breakfast Restaurant +2 more Free cancellation available You can cancel later — lock in this great price today! Booked 5 times in last 24 hours Exceptional 10 reviews 9.8 Recommended 1 night, 2 adults NPR 25,000 NPR 8,000 Includes taxes and charges See availability

e52.name: Barahi Jungle Lodge Verified ★★★★ 6 photos -37% Barahi Jungle Lodge Chitwan, Chitwan Show on map An eco-luxury jungle lodge at the edge of Chitwan National Park. Wake up to the sounds of the wild, enjoy guided jungle safaris, canoe rides, and Tharu cultural experiences in sustainable comfort. Free WiFi Breakfast Restaurant Free cancellation available You can cancel later — lock in this great price today! Popular choice in Chitwan Exceptional 10 reviews 9.4 Recommended 1 night, 2 adults NPR 35,000 NPR 22,000 Includes taxes and charges See availability

e55.name: Club Himalaya Resort Verified ★★★★ 6 photos -32% Club Himalaya Resort Nagarkot, Bhaktapur Show on map A mountain resort with panoramic views of the Himalayas and Kathmandu Valley. Perfect for nature lovers seeking tranquility with modern comforts. Free WiFi Parking Breakfast Restaurant Free cancellation available You can cancel later — lock in this great price today! Wonderful 10 reviews 9.2 Recommended 1 night, 2 adults NPR 9,500 NPR 6,500 Includes taxes and charges See availability
